plain_message: Filtering, scoring, or ranking properties or applicants by protected characteristics (race, religion, national origin, sex, disability, familial status) violates the Fair Housing Act. Remove this logic immediately.
Social Security Numbers collected for rental or mortgage applications must be encrypted at rest. Add field-level encryption before storing.
Applicant or tenant personal data (SSN, income, credit score) must not be written to logs. Log an anonymised identifier instead.
Tenant and applicant tables should have a defined retention policy. Most US states require rental application records for 3 years after denial. Add a retention or archival mechanism.
Income verification and pay stub data must be encrypted and access-logged. Add field-level encryption before storing financial documents.
Automated scraping of MLS or real estate listing data may violate the MLS terms of service and the RETS/RESO data license. Verify you have an active data agreement.
